fields.supplementalResearch:
Yep — here’s a **synthetic/mock current website research packet** for North Star. I’m intentionally making the “current site” less complete than the intake, so we can test whether the system handles gaps/conflicts cleanly.

## Current Website Research Notes

Website URL: [https://northstarhvac.com](https://northstarhvac.com)

Date reviewed: July 5, 2026

Synthetic note: This is a mock website research packet created for workflow testing. It should be treated as simulated current-site research, not a real crawl.

## 1. Business Facts Found

* Business name: North Star HVAC. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Business type: Residential HVAC contractor / heating and cooling service company. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Primary services found: AC repair, heating repair, HVAC replacement, heat pump service, seasonal tune-ups, and maintenance. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
* Secondary services found: Indoor air quality, smart thermostat installation, ductless mini-split service. These are mentioned briefly but not strongly developed. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
* Service area / locations: Site states “serving Huntersville and the Lake Norman area.” Footer mentions Huntersville, Cornelius, Davidson, and Mooresville. North Charlotte and Denver are not clearly listed. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Phone: 704-555-0184. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Email: Not found.
* Address: Site lists “Huntersville, NC” but does not show a full street address. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
* Hours: Monday–Friday, 8am–6pm. Limited after-hours emergency availability is mentioned but not explained clearly. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
* License numbers, credentials, certifications, affiliations, or insurance claims: Site states “licensed and insured” and “certified technicians,” but no license number or certification details are shown. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Years in business: 12 years. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Financing, warranties, guarantees, memberships, coupons, specials, or discounts: Financing is mentioned on the Services page, but no dedicated financing page is found. A “Spring AC Tune-Up Special” is mentioned in a homepage promo block. Warranty/guarantee language is mentioned generally but not explained in detail. Maintenance plans are mentioned lightly but no membership page exists. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))

## 2. Current Site Structure

* Home — [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/) — Main overview page. Includes hero, phone CTA, quote CTA, short service cards, short review snippet section, and Spring AC Tune-Up Special.
* Services — [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/) — Lists HVAC repair, replacement, maintenance, tune-ups, heat pump service, emergency HVAC, indoor air quality, ductless mini-splits, and smart thermostats. Content is broad and somewhat thin.
* About — [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/) — Basic company story. Mentions locally owned, family-owned, 12 years in business, licensed/insured, and practical recommendations.
* Contact — [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/) — Contact form and phone number. Includes basic service request form.
* Reviews — [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/) — Short testimonial section. Does not appear to show a full review feed.
* Specials — [https://northstarhvac.com/specials/](https://northstarhvac.com/specials/) — Spring AC Tune-Up Special. Page is short and could possibly be merged with homepage or a future seasonal campaign page.
* Service Area — Not found as a dedicated page.
* Financing — Not found as a dedicated page.
* Maintenance Plans — Not found as a dedicated page.

## 3. Old URLs Worth Preserving

* [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/) — Homepage. Important brand and conversion page. Recommended handling: preserve.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/) — Main service overview. Important for sitemap and service clarity. Recommended handling: preserve and improve.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/) — Trust/company page. Recommended handling: preserve and improve.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/) — Primary lead/contact page. Recommended handling: preserve.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/) — Trust/proof page. Recommended handling: preserve or merge into stronger proof section if thin.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/specials/](https://northstarhvac.com/specials/) — Seasonal promo page. Recommended handling: verify current offer; preserve if used in campaigns, otherwise redirect to tune-up/maintenance page.
* Missing likely high-value URLs: `/heat-pump-service/`, `/system-replacement/`, `/maintenance-plans/`, `/ac-repair/`, `/heating-repair/`, `/service-area/`, `/financing/`. Recommended handling: consider adding if confirmed by strategy.

## 4. Service Inventory

### Prominent services

* Site says: “HVAC repair and replacement for Huntersville and Lake Norman homeowners.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
  Site suggests: Repair and replacement are both core services, but replacement may need stronger explanation and lead path.

* Site says: “Heat pump repair, replacement, and maintenance.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: Heat pump service appears important and should probably have stronger page treatment.

* Site says: “Seasonal tune-ups help keep your system running efficiently.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/specials/](https://northstarhvac.com/specials/))
  Site suggests: Tune-ups are a good seasonal conversion path, especially tied to the Spring AC Tune-Up Special.

* Site says: “Maintenance helps prevent surprise breakdowns.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: Maintenance is mentioned, but the site does not yet support a full maintenance membership offer.

### Supporting services

* Site says: AC repair and heating repair are listed as service cards. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: These should remain easy to find for urgent/high-intent users.

* Site says: Emergency HVAC service may be available depending on schedule and technician availability. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
  Site suggests: Emergency messaging is intentionally limited and should not be rewritten as 24/7 guaranteed availability.

* Site says: Financing is available for qualifying replacement projects. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: Financing needs a clearer supporting page or FAQ section if it is important for system replacement leads.

### Lightly mentioned or buried services

* Site says: Indoor air quality, smart thermostats, and ductless mini-splits are listed under “Additional Services.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: These are valid services but should not dominate the homepage.

* Site says: Ductless mini-split service is available. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
  Site suggests: Intake says this is non-priority, so keep it available but secondary.

## 5. Positioning And Differentiators

* Site says: “Clear options for heating and cooling decisions.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Site says: “Repair when repair makes sense. Replace when replacement is the better long-term move.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Site says: “Locally owned and family-operated.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Site says: “Clean, respectful service from certified technicians.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Site says: “Serving Huntersville and the Lake Norman area for 12 years.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Site suggests: The strongest positioning is practical guidance without scare tactics.
* Site suggests: The tone is helpful, straightforward, local, and homeowner-friendly.
* Site suggests: The current site’s differentiators align well with the intake, but they are not emphasized strongly enough near the main CTAs.
* Review/testimonial themes visible on site: showing up on time, explaining the issue clearly, clean work, honest recommendations, and not pressuring homeowners. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/))

## 6. Conversion Flow

* Primary CTA text: “Request a Quote.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Secondary CTA text: “Call Now.” (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Phone/call path: Phone number appears in the header and contact page. The homepage says urgent heating or cooling problems should call directly. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Booking/scheduling path: No direct scheduling or booking calendar found.
* Contact form path: Contact form appears on Contact page. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
* Form fields requested: Name, phone, email, service needed, city/ZIP, message. Preferred contact method is not found. Urgency field is not found. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
* Emergency/urgent service path: Site says urgent heating or cooling issues should call directly. It does not claim guaranteed 24/7 service. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/))
* Thank-you or confirmation messaging: Not found.
* Site suggests: The quote path exists, but the form could better separate urgent calls from non-urgent quotes, maintenance requests, and replacement questions.

## 7. Mobile And CTA Friction

* Confirmed issue: Phone number is present, but no sticky mobile call/request bar is visible in the current site notes.
* Confirmed issue: Contact form is only on the Contact page and is not embedded near major service sections.
* Confirmed issue: CTA language is mostly consistent, but service-specific CTAs are generic.
* Confirmed issue: Emergency service is mentioned, but the limits are not very clear until the Contact page.
* Confirmed issue: Service area is mentioned generally as Lake Norman, but the priority towns are not clearly reinforced throughout the site.
* Confirmed issue: Maintenance plans are mentioned lightly but do not have a clear conversion path.
* Confirmed issue: Financing is mentioned, but there is no dedicated financing explanation page.
* Strategy observation: The homepage should likely make repair, replacement, maintenance, heat pump service, and Lake Norman service area clear much earlier.
* Strategy observation: The site could better route users: urgent issue → call; non-urgent quote/replacement/maintenance → form.

## 8. Trust And Proof

* Reviews/testimonials visible on the business site: Short testimonials are shown on the Reviews page. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/))
* Review themes visible on site: punctuality, clear explanations, clean work, honest recommendations, and practical repair-vs-replacement advice. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/))
* Review platform mentions: Site says “strong Google reviews,” but no live Google review feed is shown in this mock packet. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/))
* Certifications: Site says “certified technicians” but does not name specific certifications. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Awards: Not found.
* Associations: Not found.
* Before/after examples: Not found on the public site.
* Project photos: A few project photos are visible, but they are not organized into a gallery or proof section. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/))
* Team photos: Team photo appears on About page. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))
* Guarantees/warranties: Warranty/guarantee language is mentioned generally, but details are not explained. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
* Financing/payment options: Financing is mentioned as available, but no partner, terms, or process details are shown. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/))
* Safety/background/license language: Site says licensed/insured and clean professional service. (Source: [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/))

## 9. Customer Questions The Site Already Answers

* What services do they offer? Partially — the Services page lists services, but several need stronger sections.
* Where do they work? Partially — Huntersville and Lake Norman are clear; Cornelius, Davidson, and Mooresville appear in footer; Denver and North Charlotte are not clearly reinforced.
* How do I request help? Yes — Request a Quote and Call Now are present.
* Should urgent issues call directly? Yes — the site says urgent heating/cooling issues should call.
* Do they offer emergency service? Partially — limited emergency availability is mentioned, but the exact expectations are not very clear.
* Do they provide financing? Partially — financing is mentioned, but the process is not explained.
* How do I know whether to repair or replace? Partially — About page mentions practical recommendations, but the site does not deeply answer this.
* What happens after I submit a form? Not found.
* Does the diagnostic fee apply toward work? Not found on the current site.
* Do they offer maintenance plans? Partially — maintenance is mentioned, but membership plan details are not available.

## 10. Gaps, Risks, And Conflicts

* Email is missing from the current website, but intake lists [mike@northstarhvac.com](mailto:mike@northstarhvac.com). Verify whether email should appear publicly.
* Current site does not clearly list all intake service areas: North Charlotte and Denver are missing or not prominent.
* Current site says “Lake Norman area,” but does not define the 25–30 mile regular service radius from Huntersville.
* Current site does not clearly explain emergency-service limitations; intake says not to promise 24/7 availability, guaranteed same-day service, exact arrival times, or emergency coverage for every area.
* Current site mentions financing but does not explain financing availability, terms, or process.
* Current site mentions warranty/guarantee but does not provide details.
* Current site does not include diagnostic fee language from intake.
* Current site does not clearly explain that diagnostic fees may be credited toward approved repair/replacement work.
* Current site does not have a dedicated maintenance membership page, but intake says a membership plan may be added/promoted this year.
* Current site mentions “same-day availability” in trust language, but intake says not to guarantee same-day service for every request. Use carefully.
* Ductless mini-split service appears on the site, but intake says it is non-priority. Keep secondary.
* Site does not provide a dedicated service-area page, financing page, heat pump page, replacement page, maintenance/tune-up page, or emergency HVAC page.
* Google Business Profile is not available yet per intake; do not reference GBP facts beyond client-provided note.

## 11. Suggested Strategy Workspace Placement

* Supplemental research: Paste this full packet as current-site research.
* Strategy brief facts to consider: North Star HVAC is a locally owned, family-owned HVAC business serving Huntersville and Lake Norman; 12 years in business; phone 704-555-0184; repair/replacement/maintenance/heat pump service are core; urgent issues should call; quote form should support non-urgent leads.
* Content plan facts to consider: Homepage should clarify HVAC repair, replacement, maintenance, heat pump service, emergency service limits, Lake Norman service area, Spring AC Tune-Up Special, future maintenance plan, financing, and trust proof.
* Page copy facts to consider: Use practical repair-vs-replacement guidance, clean respectful service, clear options, no scare tactics, and same-day response language carefully.
* Items requiring verification: Public email use, full service-area list, emergency availability wording, diagnostic fee wording, financing details, warranty/guarantee details, maintenance membership timing, certification specifics, and review/testimonial reuse.

## 12. Source URL Notes

* [https://northstarhvac.com/](https://northstarhvac.com/) — Homepage; business name, main CTAs, phone, core service overview, service area summary, Spring AC Tune-Up Special, basic trust points.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/services/](https://northstarhvac.com/services/) — Main service inventory; HVAC repair, replacement, maintenance, heat pump service, indoor air quality, ductless mini-splits, smart thermostats, financing mention.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/about/](https://northstarhvac.com/about/) — Company background; locally owned, family-owned, 12 years in business, licensed/insured, clean service, practical recommendations.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/contact/](https://northstarhvac.com/contact/) — Contact form, phone, hours, emergency/urgent call guidance, general location.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/](https://northstarhvac.com/reviews/) — Short testimonials and review themes.
* [https://northstarhvac.com/specials/](https://northstarhvac.com/specials/) — Spring AC Tune-Up Special and seasonal promotion details.
